$description: Master brand baseline for the Branded House sub-brand system (ADR 0026). Defines the default value for every one of the 12 bounded override knobs. Emitted at :root by scripts/build-sub-brands.mjs. Sub-brands in this directory override a subset; everything they omit falls back to these defaults. This file is the ONLY place master-level knob defaults live — it does NOT touch the protected 5-tier pipeline (tokens/core, tokens/components, tokens/themes).

headingRhythmPresets.$description: Named rhythm presets a sub-brand can select by name (typography.heading-rhythm: "tight-editorial"). A sub-brand may also override explicitly with { line-height, letter-spacing }.
